title: excoecaria biglandulosa var. montevidensis
intro: Excoecaria biglandulosa var. montevidensis, also known as the 'Gamboge tree', is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Excoecaria biglandulosa var. montevidensis include the treatment of fever, skin conditions, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antiviral agent. In herbal preparations, the plant's resin is often extracted and used to create medicinal compounds, such as ointments and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
